base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of enemy_boss_galaga_nes — a character (boss) from 1981 galaga. Boss Galaga — NES palette (green/blue). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Boss Galaga — NES palette (green/blue); 2-frame wing-flap; damaged-variant follows
